<!--
Thanks for sending a PR. A few notes:

1. The title should follow Conventional Commits: `feat(scope): description`
2. Keep PRs focused — one feature/fix per PR.
3. The quality gate (`pnpm lint && pnpm format --check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:coverage`) must pass.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 sentences describing what changed and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `test` — adding or correcting tests
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, deps, CI

## Quality gate

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm format --check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test:coverage` passes (≥80%)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]` (if user-visible)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change

## Screenshots / recordings (UI changes only)

<!-- Drop before/after images or short clips here. -->

## Related issues

Closes #
